query: SELECT s.planName, s.monthlyCost, s.monthlyRevenue, s.marginPercent, s.billingPlatform, s.provider FROM services s WHERE s.billingPlatform LIKE '%SasBoss%' AND s.monthlyRevenue > 0 LIMIT 8;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute SELECT s.planName, s.monthlyCost, s.monthlyRevenue, s.marginPercent, s.billingPlatform, s.provider FROM services s WHERE s.billingPlatform LIKE '%SasBoss%' AND s.monthlyRevenue > 0 LIMIT 8;
